analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for a test-website. The theme needs to be enhanced with animated objects, slides, and pages related to black holes. The CSS file should include animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML should be completed to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. A mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon should be added for better usability on mobile devices.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, including mobile menu toggle functionality.
